caption: A man with a distinctively tall, spiky grey wig, glasses, and headphones is seated in a studio setting, appearing to record a podcast. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt paired with a patterned red bow tie. In front of him is a professional black microphone. The background features a wall adorned with various framed photographs and clothing items hanging on racks, including shirts labeled "LEE". On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that reads "TALK OIL PODCAST" and a banner on the right with the text "SS TALK JOY". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, shifting his facial expressions and slightly adjusting his head and mouth as he speaks. The lighting and camera angle remain constant, focusing on the man from the chest up as he engages in a conversation.
